p.em: MOJO · DOJO · SPACE COWBOY — Staking tiers on Solana

div.p: Gaze Input Eye Tracker / OpenXR (x,y,z, duration, velocity)
AGT Tensor Factory Agentive Gaze Tensors
COG Cognitive Fixations, saccades UI element targeting
EMO Emotional Pupil dilation, blinks Arousal/mood proxy
ENV Environmental Head pose, light Device context
Markov Chain Model COG↔EMO↔ENV transitions Behavioral biometric sig Living key evolution
Knot Parameterizer Gaze → Trefoil braid word Saccade → σ_k^±1 generators Fixation → crossing params
Polynomial Engine Alexander Δ(t) → KDF seed Jones V(q) → Signatures Post-quantum hardness
TKDF Trefoil Knot Derivation Function seed + AGT entropy + HKDF → 256-bit living key
Hybrid E2EE NaCl X25519 + Kyber-1024 TKDF-derived session keys Post-quantum resistant
JettChat UI Next.js 14 + shadcn/ui Orange theme / X Chat clone Three-panel layout
Map of Augments Force-directed graph 35 nodes, AGT tensors Fullscreen overlay
JETT Auth X OAuth 2.0 PKCE Solana wallet sign Gaze biometrics Ed25519 JWT
Attestation Hook 50 msgs OR 60s batch SHA-256 Merkle tree Submit root → Solana
Convex Real-time DB users, agents, messages channels, attestations
SpacetimeDB Edge-primary DB Reducers + subscriptions memory, gaze, sessions
Solana jettchat-attestation program ChannelState PDAs Attestation PDAs JTX stake gating
AstroJOE Hermes brain v3 Grok 4.20 multi-agent Primary intelligent agent
Edge JOE Jetson daemon X Community bridge OAuth 1.0a relay
TraderJOE XRP/SOL swarm LP management Grid + oracle bots
Hermes Skills Plugin marketplace /skill invocation Third-party augments
OpenClaw Sandbox WASM/container exec NemoClaw policies Capability enforcement
Agent Trust Layer ERC-8004 identity x402 micropayments DEC score / $TRUST Cross-chain reputation

Conduit Matrix homeserver matrix.jettoptics.ai Federated rooms
HEDGEHOG MCP Grok 4.20 gateway 12 tools, stdio API tracking
AARON Router FastAPI on Jetson :8888 Audit + RAG + gaze verify
X Community Bridge Space Cowboys Inbound: poll timeline Outbound: POST /2/tweets
LoRa/Meshtastic Offline mesh fallback Text-only gaze-auth DePIN radio nodes
AR/XR Glasses Eye tracking → AGT Hand tracking → auth Continuous gaze input
Spatial Chat 3D message placement Gaze-anchored holograms World-space encryption
JOENAVUX Spatial menu system Gaze dwell → select Blink/gesture → confirm
IoT Wearables Continuous biometrics Living key refresh DePIN mesh nodes
